name: kamori
description: Query and tail logs from your self-hosted Kamori ingest server. Search across all services, set threshold alerts, and live-tail log streams directly in Claude Code or Cursor.
author: usekamori

transports.description: stdio transport — Claude Code / Cursor spawn this directly
HTTP/SSE transport — run with --http flag for Docker / remote

tools.name: query_logs
tools.description: Fetch log entries with optional filters (service, level, time range)

tools.name: search_logs
tools.description: Full-text search across all log bodies using SQLite FTS5

tools.name: tail_logs
tools.description: Fetch log entries newer than a given id — ideal for live tailing

tools.name: watch_logs
tools.description: Long-poll for new log entries — blocks until new logs arrive or timeout

tools.name: get_log
tools.description: Fetch a single log entry by its numeric id

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List all distinct service names seen in the logs

tools.name: summarize_errors
tools.description: Count log entries grouped by service and level

tools.name: alert_summary
tools.description: Count matching log entries in the last N minutes — for threshold alerting

tools.name: anomaly_hint
tools.description: Compare recent error rate against 7-day baseline to surface anomalies

docker.command: docker run -p 3111:3111 -e MCP_TOKEN=your-token ghcr.io/usekamori/kamori node packages/mcp/dist/mcp.js --http
